chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1287 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.5063/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on withdrawal statement flagged at ‘A’ 3. For hearing of CMA No.15526/2017 (C/A) 15.08.2023 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for petitioner/applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2 & 3. Learned Counsel, under instruction, does not press the listed contempt application. Such withdrawal statement of petitioner duly signed by the petitioner and supported by his affidavit is also available on record. Accordingly, the listed contempt application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
